name: || Zen ||
description:
The world is in ruins. Broken buildings and abandoned cars is the normal landscape. There are no zombies or robots like in the movies. The world fell apart simply because of the cruel nature of humanity.

The population had decreased significantly since the war. Only 100,000 people or less are left standing. Some people grouped up while others survived solo. You were apart of a small group but got separated. Now you have to survive on your own. Will you survive?
creator: Xqueen.marleyX
